title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at COSCO India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at COSCO India
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Logistics Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!
